channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Max Muncy becomes first player to reach in 12 straight plate appearances in single postseason
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Los Angeles Dodgers slugger Max Muncy became the first player to reach base in 12 consecutive plate appearances during a single postseason.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Grand Junction football cruises to third straight league win
item.description: Entering Thursday with their best start (6-1) since 2011, Grand Junction welcomed 4A I-25 league foe Centaurus.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Mountain West commissioner says she's heartbroken over turmoil surrounding San Jose State volleyball
item.description: LAS VEGAS (AP) — Mountain West Conference Commissioner Gloria Nevarez said Thursday the forfeitures that volleyball teams are willing to take to avoid playing San Jose State is “not what we celebrate in college athletics” and that she is heartbroken over what has transpired this season surrounding t
item.dc:creator: MARK ANDERSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Ravens fan seen in viral fight video identified, warrant issued for arrest, police say
item.description: The Baltimore Police Department issued an arrest warrant for a man seen in a video wearing a Ravens jersey and in an altercation with Washington Commanders fans, officials said.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Nevada college says it won't cancel volleyball match against school with transgender player due to state law
item.description: The University of Nevada told Fox News Digital it won't forfeit its upcoming game against a transgender opponent because doing so would violate state law.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: All-Star 1B Freddie Freeman out of Dodgers' lineup for Game 4 of NLCS against Mets
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — All-Star first baseman Freddie Freeman was out of the Los Angeles Dodgers' starting lineup for Game 4 of the National League Championship Series against the New York Mets. Freeman has been playing with a badly sprained and swollen right ankle throughout the postseason.
item.dc:creator: MIKE FITZPATRICK, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: New renderings show how A's ballpark would transform Las Vegas Strip
item.description: Extensive details have been revealed about the proposed $1.5 billion "multi-purpose, enclosed ballpark" on the Las Vegas Strip that could become home to the Las Vegas Athletics MLB franchise in time for the 2028 baseball season.
item.dc:creator: Justin Walker, Fox 5

item.title: Justin Fields says he hasn't played well enough for Steelers to not consider Russell Wilson at QB
item.description: PITTSBURGH (AP) — Justin Fields seems to be at peace with the idea of getting benched in favor of Russell Wilson, even with the Pittsburgh Steelers at 4-2 and tied with Baltimore for first place in the AFC North.
item.dc:creator: WILL GRAVES, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Chargers' Jim Harbaugh says cardiologist told him he has 'the heart of an athlete' following medical scare
item.description: Los Angeles Chargers head coach Jim Harbaugh said his doctors told him that he has "the heart of an athlete" following his medical scare during the Chargers last game.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Tuchel's hiring by England sparks dismay and resignation among British soccer coaches
item.description: LONDON (AP) — British soccer managers reacted with disappointment and a degree of resignation on Thursday after a German, Thomas Tuchel, was hired to take charge of England ahead of a homegrown coach.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: A German in charge of England? Nationality matters less than it used to in international soccer
item.description: The question was inevitable. At his first news conference as England’s newly appointed head coach, Thomas Tuchel – a German – was asked on Wednesday what message he had for fans who would have preferred an Englishman in charge of their beloved national team.
item.dc:creator: STEVE DOUGLAS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Ionescu's 3-pointer with 1 second left gives Liberty 80-77 win over Lynx and 2-1 lead in WNBA Finals
item.description: MINNEAPOLIS (AP) — Sabrina Ionescu watched Breanna Stewart carry the New York Liberty all game, until it was time to win it. Then the ball was hers. “In the timeout, (coach) Sandy (Brondello) was like, ‘You’re going to shoot the shot,'" Ionescu said.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Giants' woes continue with loss of Andrew Thomas
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) -- Things have taken a massive downturn for the Giants. The Giants are 2 and 4 and now they have lost their franchise tackle Andrew Thomas for the season after undergoing surgery for a Lisfranc injury on his left foot.
item.dc:creator: Marc Malusis, PIX 11

item.title: Cole Kmet earns NFC Special Teams Player of the Week honors
item.description: Cole Kmet was named NFC Special Teams Player of the Week for Week 6 after successfully snapping on all five of the Bears' point-after attempts during their game in London against the Jacksonville Jaguars.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Injured Alex Cobb dropped from Guardians' ALCS roster, replaced by Ben Lively
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Pitcher Alex Cobb was dropped from Cleveland's American League Championship Series roster on Tuesday after he got hurt yet again in the opener, leaving the Guardians in search of a Game 5 starter against the New York Yankees. “It’s been a challenging year.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Bears vs Commanders flexed to later time slot: NFL
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — The Chicago Bears Week 8 game at the Washington Commanders has been flexed to the late afternoon window, according to a press release from the NFL League Office. The NFL announced Tuesday the Bears’ Week 8 road matchup against the Commanders has been flexed to 3:25 p.m.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: San Diego Sockers release 2024-2025 season tickets and schedule
item.description: Season tickets and the full season schedule for the San Diego Sockers' 2024-2025 season are now available for fans to purchase.
item.dc:creator: Anna Ashcraft, Fox 5

item.title: Caleb Williams and the Bears are looking good at their bye with 3 straight wins and a 4-2 mark
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — Caleb Williams is settling into a rhythm, and the Bears are racking up wins. Overall, things are looking good for Chicago.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: BYU hopes to finish strong after 6-0 start
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - From being picked 13th in the Big 12 Conference, to be ranked 13th in the nation, BYU is off to a 6-0 start for just the sixth time in school history without any superstars or sure-fire NFL prospects. In fact, 16 different players have scored touchdowns this year.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: New Jersey hands Utah its first loss, 3-0
item.description: NEWARK, N.J. (ABC4 Sports) - After scoring an NHL-leading 16 goals through the first three games of the season, the Utah Hockey Club had a devil of a time scoring at New Jersey.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Lindor homers as Mets stop Dodgers' scoreless streak in 7-3 win, head to NY with NLCS tied 1-1
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — The New York Mets weren't sure what they were going to get with the Los Angeles Dodgers sending out a parade of relievers in a bullpen game. They found out right away.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: Royals keep playoff hopes alive with 3-0 win over Seattle
item.description: SANDY, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - In the second to last home game of the season, the Utah Royals kept their playoff hopes alive for another week, beating the Seattle Reign 3-0 off of a Cloe Lacasse hat trick.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Mets add McNeil to NLCS roster while Dodgers drop Vesia and Rojas, add Kiermaier and Honeywell
item.description: Jeff McNeil was added to the New York Mets' roster for the NL Championship Series against the Los Angeles Dodgers after recovering from a broken right wrist. Right-handed reliever Adam Ottavino was dropped from the Mets' roster. Tommy Edman will start at shortstop throughout the NLCS, Roberts said.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Winners of the 2024 Bank of America Chicago Marathon
item.description: Runners from across the world gathered in Chicago Sunday for the 2024 Bank of America Chicago Marathon.
item.dc:creator: Ethan Illers, WGN 9

item.title: Billy Crystal and Spike Lee take their places at the Hall of Fame as basketball superfans
item.description: Honored for his devotion to a basketball team that doesn't have a Hall of Fame history, Billy Crystal couldn't help but note the irony. The actor is being added to the Naismith Memorial Basketball Hall of Fame’s James F.
item.dc:creator: BRIAN MAHONEY, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Bears dominate Jaguars in London, 35-16, to extend winning streak to 3 games going into bye week
item.description: The Bears capped off their London trip in style Sunday, routing the Jacksonville Jaguars, 35-16, at Tottenham Hotspur Stadium to extend their winning streak to three games and improve to 4-2 on the season.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Keller scores game-winner in OT as Utah HC stays unbeaten
item.description: NEW YORK (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah Hockey Club took a big bite out of the Big Apple this week. After an overtime win over the New York Islanders on Thursday, Utah did the same thing to the Rangers at Madison Square Garden on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Los Angeles Dodgers announce starting pitcher for NLCS Game 1
item.description: The Los Angeles Dodgers relied on spectacular pitching to escape the NL Division Series in five games against the San Diego Padres, and it's nearly time to see if those performances will carry over into the NL Championship Series.
item.dc:creator: Austin Turner, KTLA 5

item.title: Blackhawks visit Oilers in Western Conference play
item.description: Chicago Blackhawks (0-1-1, in the Central Division) vs. Edmonton Oilers (0-1, in the Pacific Division) Edmonton, Alberta; Saturday, 10 p.m.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9
